identityOneLiner: Read-only checks at verify time—not color.
heroSubtitle: Tool effects vs read-only store facts.
visitorProblemAnswer:
Traces say success while data disagrees.

AgentSkeptic read-only: tool claims vs stored state before ship or bill.
heroOutcome: Agents can report success while the database is still wrong.
heroMechanism: AgentSkeptic re-checks your real stores and fails CI before missing writes reach production.
guaranteeFootnote: Read-only checks; not which call wrote.

siteDefaultMetadata.title: AgentSkeptic
siteDefaultMetadata.description: Structured tool activity vs downstream state at verify time: SQL (SQLite, Postgres, MySQL), HTTP witnesses, supported vector indexes, MongoDB documents, and S3-compatible objects when configured—deterministic verdict artifacts (see verification-state-stores.md).

pageMetadata.title: Traces vs state
pageMetadata.description: Structured tool activity vs downstream state at verify time: SQL (SQLite, Postgres, MySQL), HTTP witnesses, supported vector indexes, MongoDB documents, and S3-compatible objects when configured—deterministic verdict artifacts (see verification-state-stores.md).

shareableTerminalDemo.title: Bundled terminal proof
shareableTerminalDemo.transcript:
### Success (`wf_complete`)

workflow_id: wf_complete
workflow_status: complete
trust: TRUSTED: Every step matched the database under the configured verification rules.
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Matched the database.

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_complete",
  "status": "complete",
  "steps": [{ "seq": 0, "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact", "status": "verified" }]
}

### Failure (`wf_missing`)

workflow_id: wf_missing
workflow_status: inconsistent
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Expected row is missing from the database.
    reference_code: ROW_ABSENT

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_missing",
  "status": "inconsistent",
  "steps": [
    {
      "seq": 0,
      "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact",
      "status": "missing",
      "reasons": [{ "code": "ROW_ABSENT" }]
    }
  ]
}

integrate.title: Get started
integrate.description: Run one verification that compares tool claims against actual stored state.

pricing.positioning: Catch bad or missing state in CI before it reaches customers, compliance, or revenue.

claim.title: Claim verification run — AgentSkeptic
claim.description: Link a CLI run to an account.

integratePage.truthCheckCommand:
npx agentskeptic check --workflow-id YOUR_WORKFLOW_ID \
  --project ./your-app \
  --db ./path/to/readable.sqlite

# Or explicit registry/events paths:
# npx agentskeptic check --workflow-id YOUR_WORKFLOW_ID \
#   --events ./agentskeptic/events.ndjson \
#   --registry ./agentskeptic/tools.json \
#   --db ./path/to/readable.sqlite
integratePage.quickVerifyCommand:
npx agentskeptic quick \
  --input path/to/quick-input.ndjson \
  --export-registry path/to/tools.json \
  --db path/to/readable.sqlite \
  --no-human-report
integratePage.packLedCommand:
npx agentskeptic activate --input ./path/to/workflow-bootstrap-input.json \
  --db ./path/to/readable.sqlite \
  --out ./path/to/agent-pack

# Replay only (advanced): NDJSON pack you already authored
npx agentskeptic crossing \
  --workflow-id YOUR_WORKFLOW_ID \
  --events ./path/to/events.ndjson \
  --registry ./path/to/tools.json \
  --db ./path/to/readable.sqlite

mechanism.title: How
mechanism.notObservability: State vs claims; not a full APM or log product.

problemIndex.symptom: A LangGraph trace looks successful, but the Postgres row is missing.
A tool loop reports success, but CRM state is wrong.
CI passes, but the database write never landed.
Add a read-only SQL gate before production.
Debug Postgres state after a LangGraph run.
Compare Stripe webhooks with database rows.
